programme.desc: Pasangan kekasih berpisah tatkala lelaki yang dikasihi pergi melanjutkan pelajaran. Dia berjanji akan mengahwini pasangannya bila dia kembali. Tetapi terhalang setelah dia temui perenpuan lain.

programme.title: Cupcake Mama

programme.desc: Mat So'od merupakan penglipurlara di kampungnya. Namun berlawanan dengan kerjayanya, Mat So'od merupakan seorang pemurung hampir sepanjang hidupnya.

programme.title: Jalan Kembali: Bohsia 2

programme.title: Raazi

programme.desc: The 1998/99 UEFA Champions League final between Manchester United and Bayern Munich at the Nou Camp. Victory for United would clinch an historic treble.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: A look back at the 1999/00 UEFA Champions League final between Real Madrid and Valencia in Paris. Steve McManaman, signed from Liverpool the previous summer, featured for Madrid.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the dramatic 2001 final between Bayern Munich and Valencia in Milan. Bayern, chasing their first title in a quarter-century, featured a 20-year-old Owen Hargreaves.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 2001/02 UEFA Champions League final saw a star-studded Real Madrid face Bayer Leverkusen in Glasgow. The match featured arguably the greatest goal in the competition's history.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003 final between Serie A rivals Juventus and AC Milan at Old Trafford. Paolo Maldini was aiming to lift the trophy as captain, just as his father had done in 1963.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003/04 UEFA Champions League final between Monaco and Porto in Gelsenkirchen. Jose Mourinho would leave Porto to take over at Chelsea just days later.

programme.title: Live: Commonwealth Games 360
programme.desc: Coverage from the day session on day one of the Games, which take place in Glasgow. The games first took place back in Hamilton, Canada in 1930 and took place again in 1934 and 1938, before being cancelled in 1942 and 1946 because of the Second World War. Since its return in 1950 the games have continued to take place every four years and are being held in Glasgow for the second time in 12 years,

programme.title: United Sharks of America
programme.desc: Exploring shark behavior and the wide variety of species that thrive along the coastal U.S. to discover when beachgoers may be most vulnerable to a shark attack.

programme.title: Sharks of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Marine biologist Dr. Austin Gallagher searches for the holy grail of shark research -- the secret breeding grounds of tiger sharks.

programme.title: Maui Shark Mystery
programme.desc: A fearless team dives in to solve the secret gathering of Maui sharks.

programme.title: Sky Sharks: Closer Than You Think
programme.desc: A team of scientists embarks on an adventurous journey with the help of the latest drone technology, and unveils the startling proximity of sharks to the shore, and reveals amazing shark action.

programme.title: Return of the White Shark
programme.desc: A record number of great white sharks are hunting off Cape Cod.

programme.title: Saved From a Shark
programme.desc: The remarkable stories of people saved from shark attacks by other species.

programme.title: Bull Shark Bandits
programme.desc: Using a new experimental diving cage, two shark biologists investigate rising reports of bull sharks stealing from fishermen in northern Australia.

programme.title: Shark Below Zero
programme.desc: White Sharks move north to Canadian waters where scientists investigate.

programme.title: Sharkcano: Hawaii
programme.desc: To find out why sharks are drawn to Hawaii's volcanoes, Dr. Mike Heithaus and Dr. Frances Farabaugh free dive with one of the most dangerous sharks.

programme.title: Attack of the Samurai Sharks
programme.desc: Shark experts investigate a 3,000-year-old skeleton found in Japan with unusual cut marks that could be the earliest known victim of a shark attack.

programme.title: Attack of the Red Sea Sharks
programme.desc: Shark attacks in the Red Sea as part of a trend worldwide.

programme.title: Shark Attack Files
programme.desc: Researchers investigate why sharks attack surfers at such alarming rates.

programme.title: Shark Gangs
programme.desc: For years sharks have been viewed as solitary predators, but scientists have recently discovered a surprising new behavior -- that this apex predator likes to hang out in gangs.

programme.title: Tiger Shark Terror
programme.desc: Professional shark diver Eli Martinez and scientist Matthew Smukall plunge into the nighttime world of Tiger Beach to investigate whether shark behavior changes once the sun goes down.

programme.title: Secrets of the Bull Shark
programme.desc: Marine biologist Dr. Ryan Daly and a team of scientists utilize cutting-edge technology to reveal the movements and behavior of bull sharks.

programme.title: Hear Better With Audien
programme.desc: Audien Hearing is a leader in over-the-counter hearing aids, committed to making high-quality hearing accessible to all. Discover how advanced, affordable solutions are helping more people experience better hearing every day.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: CSN Mint - America 250 Silver Eagles
programme.desc: Join CSN Mint for two patriotic 1776-2026 Silver Eagle overstrikes featuring the American Flag Privy and Constitution Privy. Designed by Daniel Carr, struck using a retired Denver Mint press, and certified perfect MS70.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Shark vs. Whale
programme.desc: A drone films a humpback whale being strategically drowned by a great white shark; marine biologist Ryan Johnson explores how and why great white sharks become whale killers.

programme.title: Shark vs. Tuna
programme.desc: Oceanic titans clash in the remote crystal-blue battlefields of Ascension Island, where the yellowfin tuna are often faster, fitter and bigger than the sharks, reaching well over 250 pounds.

programme.title: Sharks vs. Dolphins: Blood Battle
programme.desc: A team of experts travels to Shark Bay, Australia, to unlock the secrets of shark and dolphin combat; cutting-edge technology provides a window into this seldom-seen conflict.

programme.title: Sharks vs. Dolphins: Bahamas Battleground
programme.desc: In the Bahamas, over 30% of dolphins have shark bite scars; using a non-toxic gel bite pad and a life-sized dolphin lure, a look at bite impressions of three species that could be predators.

programme.title: Sharks vs. the World
programme.desc: Sharks go head-to-head with surfers, scientists, sea lions and even whales.

programme.title: Shark vs. Predator
programme.desc: Rare instances of predation on sharks by seals, crocodiles, octopi, bobcats and birds.

programme.title: Man vs. Shark
programme.desc: After inventing armored suits for divers 40 years ago, Jeremiah Sullivan jumps back in the water to test out just how foolproof his latest creation really is against hungry hammerheads and deadly tiger sharks.

programme.title: Great White vs Tiger Shark
programme.desc: Up close with some of the largest great white and tiger sharks ever filmed.

programme.title: Bull Shark vs. Hammerhead
programme.desc: A rare event between top ocean predators was captured on video in Florida, bull sharks attacking a great hammerhead; Dr. Heithaus and a team of shark experts launch an investigation pitting one against the other.

programme.title: Cannibal Sharks: Shark vs. Shark
programme.desc: Whether on the hook or in utero, sharks eat their own and scientists from Australia to Florida use the latest tagging and tracking measures to understand why.

programme.title: Orca vs. Great White
programme.desc: Researchers investigate if orcas are hunting great whites in New Zealand.

programme.title: Shark vs. Giant Croc
programme.desc: Shark experts Nico Lubitz and Adam Barnett head into the wilds of northeastern Australia to investigate reports of bull sharks and saltwater crocodiles clashing along the Daintree River.

programme.title: Shark Island Showdown
programme.desc: At remote Norfolk Island in the South Pacific, shark experts Lauren Meyer, Adam Barnett and Charlie Huveneers investigate why tiger, dusky and Galápagos sharks gather here in such high numbers.

programme.title: Great White Gauntlet
programme.desc: Shark experts investigate unusually high great white activity around a seal and sea lion colony off Australia's Greenly Island.

programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 27
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 27

programme.desc: Daniel Miller has to take care of the carpool for his sons and the neighbourhood school children when his wife falls sick. However, in the course of the day, he finds himself a victim of a robbery.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When Kiki helps facilitate a final public appearance between her famous boss and her estranged husband, she experiences an unexpected spark of attraction and falls for him.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Max, a pet dog, gets jealous when Katie, his owner, adopts another dog, Duke. However, they are forced to face challenges together when Ozone, a cat, plots to get them caught by Animal Control.

programme.title: Surviving Christmas
programme.desc: A lonely rude millionaire bribes a family to celebrate Christmas with him.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A neurotic thirty-something woman resolves to finally take control of her life once and for all, while looking for h love.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: A duo of shock-headed Trolls venture outside the boundaries of their kingdom on a quest to save their village from destruction by the large creatures who devour Trolls to make them feel happy.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: William, a British bookseller, meets and falls in love with Anna, a high-profile American actress. However, their relationship goes through many problems due to their different social statuses.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: Alison, an ambitious television reporter, has a one-night stand with Ben, an immature loafer. When Alison gets pregnant as a result, the two attempt to stay together and have the child.

programme.title: She's Out of My League
programme.desc: An insecure airport security officer’s world shifts when a confident and beautiful woman shows interest in him, forcing him to confront self-doubt and social expectations.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: Jerry, a mischievous mouse, takes refuge in a fancy hotel that is set to host a wedding. In order to get rid of him, one of the event planners hires Jerry's feline rival, Tom.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul, the young scion of House Atreides, faces troubling visions of the future. Meanwhile, his family fights to gain control over Arrakis, the only source of the valuable spice melange.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: When talented getaway driver Baby meets his dream girl, Debora, he chooses to leave his shady life behind. But when he is called in for one last heist with an unstable crew, things get dicey.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: With the kingdom in need of a ruler after King Harold's death, Shrek embarks on a quest to find Arthur, Fiona's cousin, while Prince Charming plans to seize control of the throne.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: When Warden Hennessey offers Jensen and other prisoners a chance to compete in a weaponised car race, millions watch as these criminals with life sentences race armoured cars to earn their freedom.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.

programme.title: The Dyatlov Pass Incident
programme.desc: Five students go to the location of the infamous Dyatlov pass incident to make a documentary, but things take a turn for the worse as the secret of what happened there is revealed.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: A legendary monster named King Ghidorah awakens Rodan, as well as other titans, to destroy the world. To defeat them, the crypto-zoological organisation Monarch must rely on the almighty Godzilla.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: As a nefarious force imperils Earth, an unlikely alliance forms between Optimus Prime's Autobots and the mighty Maximals, aided by two humans to safeguard mankind's future.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Bond - EP 14 / 寄生

Xiu Huan left home in despair...

The 118 rush to save lives in the aftermath of a massive train derailment.

In the aftermath of the dam break, massive mudslides wreak havoc throughout Los Angeles; Athena fights to save herself and an agoraphobic woman after her house collapses; a group of pregnant women trapped in a submerged house.

The team races to save a man under siege by his high-tech smart home; a yoga teacher loses her vision; Athena hunts down a bank robber disguised by COVID-19 protocols; members of the 118's crew prepare for an out-of-state mission.

Athena investigates a mysterious murder during a neighborhood block party; the 118 rush to save lives endangered by a bomb threat; Chimney has a hard time keeping secrets when Maddie and Buck's parents come to town.
The 118 races to save the lives of workers trapped in a factory fire; Maddie reveals a painful family secret that causes Buck to confront his childhood and answer why he is the daredevil he is today.

The 118 has a day from hell with a never-ending series of bizarre emergency calls; a man tapes himself to a freeway billboard; a restaurant manager destroys his own business; Eddie feels a spark with Christopher's former teacher.

A man gets pinned under a Humvee; a garage band rocks out too hard; Michael notices strange behavior at a nearby apartment; Hen's mother unexpectedly arrives and announces she is moving to Los Angeles.

Kejahilan masyarakat Arab ini masih wujud dan ada di antaranya masih diamalkan sehingga sekarang.
